channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gateway expands Yandal gold project with 4km mineralised zone and promising high-grade results
item.description: Gateway Mining has significantly expanded the scale of its Yandal gold project in Western Australia, identifying a continuous 4-kilometre stretch of shallow oxide gold mineralisation at its Haflinger ...

item.title: Moderate 5.2-Magnitude Earthquake Felt in Islamabad and Rawalpindi
item.description: On Monday morning, residents of Islamabad and Rawalpindi experienced tremors as a 5.2-magnitude earthquake occurred at 10:56am, according to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD). The quake's e...

item.title: East African Community Strengthens Regional Preparedness for Future Outbreaks
item.description: East African countries are coming together to strengthen regional collaboration in preparing for future pandemics. During the World Health Summit Regional Meeting 2026 in Nairobi, leaders and health p...

item.title: Iran issues warning to US over naval operations in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On Monday, Iran's military publicly warned the United States Navy to avoid entering the Strait of Hormuz, heightening tensions in the region. This warning came shortly after US President Donald Trump ...

item.title: SNL’s Kam Patterson Jokes About Dating Megan Thee Stallion on Weekend Update
item.description: On the May 3, 2026 episode of Saturday Night Live, comedian Kam Patterson made headlines during the 'Weekend Update' segment when he humorously commented on Megan Thee Stallion's recent breakup with K...

item.title: Authorities Clear Nancy Guthrie’s Son-in-Law in Her Disappearance Case
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, a resident of Catalina Foothills near Tucson, Arizona, went missing on February 1, 2026. Initial media reports suggested her son-in-law, Tommaso Cioni, might be involved, as he and his ...

item.title: Mali Faces Security Challenges Amid Political Vacuum
item.description: The April 25, 2026 attacks across several Malian cities show that despite five years of political transition, security remains fragile. These coordinated assaults on key urban centres like Bamako, Kat...

item.title: Philippine National Police to Deploy 17,000 AI-Connected Body Cameras for Transparency
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) announced that it will acquire approximately 17,000 body-worn cameras to enhance transparency and accountability in law enforcement operations. According to PNP Ch...

item.title: SAPS and partner agencies show exceptional bravery in Komati River operation
item.description: The recent operation along the Komati River in Mpumalanga showcased extraordinary courage and professionalism by the South African Police Service (SAPS) and collaborating agencies. Capt Johan “Pottie”...

item.title: Iowa woman dies after post-surgery complications reportedly overlooked by hospital staff
item.description: Laura Belt, a 46-year-old woman from Iowa, died in May 2024 due to complications following a routine hernia repair surgery. According to a lawsuit filed by her family, nurses at Decatur County Hospita...

item.title: Nigeria Summons SA High Commissioner Over Violence Against Nigerian Nationals
item.description: Nigeria's Foreign Affairs Minister, Bianca Odumegwu-Ojukwu, has formally summoned South Africa's High Commissioner to Nigeria, Thamsanqa Mseleku, following violent xenophobic attacks targeting African...

item.title: Details emerge about items found with accused killer of five-year-old in Alice Springs
item.description: Authorities in Alice Springs are investigating disturbing details surrounding the death of five-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby. Jefferson Lewis, 47, has been charged with murder after the child was fo...

item.title: Plant-Based Bakery Ard Draws Crowds in Stanmore
item.description: Ard, a plant-based bakery in Stanmore, has quickly become a weekend hotspot thanks to Christiana Daaboul’s first bricks-and-mortar venture. The bakery, located on Stafford Road, offers a selection of ...

item.title: Moderate 5.2-magnitude earthquake felt in Islamabad and Rawalpindi
item.description: On Monday morning, residents of Islamabad and Rawalpindi felt tremors as a 5.2-magnitude earthquake was recorded at 10:56am, according to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD). The epicentre wa...

item.title: Traffic officer recovers stolen cellphone in Westridge, Mitchells Plain
item.description: In Westridge, Mitchells Plain, a traffic officer has been hailed as a local hero after recovering a stolen cellphone in the early hours of Thursday morning. Winston Sims, a traffic speed enforcer with...

item.title: Senior Congress Leader Ripun Bora Enters Barchalla Contest in Assam Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: Ripun Bora, a senior Congress leader and former Rajya Sabha MP, has declared his candidature for the 2026 Assam assembly elections from the Barchalla constituency in Sonitpur district. Bora, who previ...

item.title: Effective M&A Strategies for Canadian Companies in Uncertain Markets
item.description: Despite ongoing economic and geopolitical uncertainty, Canadian companies are encouraged to maintain a well-planned mergers and acquisitions (M&A) strategy. According to David Savard, global head of M...

item.title: Obi and Kwankwaso Join NDC, Shifting Political Dynamics for 2027 Elections
item.description: The political landscape for the 2027 Nigerian general elections has shifted following the defection of Peter Obi, the Labour Party's 2023 presidential candidate, and Rabiu Kwankwaso, former presidenti...

item.title: Mater Hospital Nairobi Receives Sh100 Million Medical Equipment Donation from Dublin Partner
item.description: Mater Misericordiae Hospital in Nairobi has received 163 pieces of medical equipment valued at Sh100 million from its founding partner, Mater Misericordiae University Hospital in Dublin. The donation ...

item.title: Starmer travels to European summit amid Labour calls to strengthen EU ties ahead of local elections
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer has opted to travel to Yerevan, Armenia, for a European Political Community summit, rather than focus on the imminent local elections in the UK. The summit, which includes ...
